_comment: Style templates for Samsung Frame TV Art, revised 2026-07-16 to match evidence from actual Frame TV Art bestseller research (not generic wall art trends). Proven patterns: coastal/landscape, neutral/light florals, muted-palette abstract, minimalist line art, vintage botanical/antique illustration, and seasonal sets suited for bundling. Dropped art-deco and vintage-travel-poster (no supporting evidence for this specific niche) and lightened moody-botanical's dark academia palette to neutral/airy (proven pattern is light florals, not dark).
prompt_suffix: flat 2D digital artwork filling the entire canvas edge to edge, not a photograph of a painting, no frame, no wall, no room, no gallery, no people, no text, no watermark, no signature
